sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system documentation available for this puzzle-platform game

special_mechanics.name: Stacking
special_mechanics.description: Humans can stack on top of each other to reach high ledges

special_mechanics.name: Tool Usage
special_mechanics.description: Spears can be thrown across gaps to other humans, used to jump chasms, or brandished to hold off dinosaurs

special_mechanics.name: Rideable NPCs
special_mechanics.description: Pterodactylus and other creatures can be ridden to reach otherwise unreachable platforms

tier_notes: Tier 3 - Empirical/Qualitative only. The Humans is a puzzle-platform game prioritizing puzzle-solving and tool mechanics over precise movement physics. No technical movement parameters are documented in available sources. The game emphasizes team coordination and environmental puzzle-solving rather than platforming skill.
